      se

subtasks.description: Validate/dedupe tickers; tag by industry/sub-industry, position type, conviction; note any missing fields
completion_evidence: Validated 48 unique tickers: 24 longs, 24 shorts. All have conviction scores (0.55-0.80), position types, industry tags, and reasoning. No duplicates. Coverage spans 6 industries with sufficient candidates for portfolio constraints (15-20 longs, 12-15 shorts).

subtasks.description: If pool lacks coverage for 15–20 longs and 12–15 shorts, Call pull_rest_of_ticker_pool to supplement universe
completion_evidence: Supplemental ticker pool NOT needed. Have 24 longs (target 15-20) and 24 shorts (target 12-15), providing sufficient coverage and selection flexibility across 6 Consumer Staples industries.

subtasks.description: Document data gaps/assumptions; do not fabricate
completion_evidence: Data gaps documented: Missing sub-industry details, specific valuation metrics (FCF yield, EV/EBIT), and quantified momentum scores. These will be gathered in Task 2 via fundamental and factor analysis tools. NO data fabrication - all gaps acknowledged.

tasks.description: Construct Portfolio v1 and perform diagnostics; log to memory

subtasks.description: Select 15–20 longs and 12–15 shorts from pool using conviction, fundamentals, momentum, diversification
Draft allocations targeting net +30% (±5%), gross 150–250% (target 180%); respect short-size limits (liquid 4–5%, illiquid 2–3%)
Build portfolio_dict exactly per Dictionary Format Rules (double quotes, no trailing commas)
Call portfolio_exposure_calculator (exposure_type='net' and 'gross') to verify exposures
Call calculate_portfolio_beta_vs_index to verify beta in [0.175, 0.6] and non-negative
Call calculate_portfolio_returns_metrics and calculate_portfolio_performance for returns and Sharpe/Alpha
Call calculate_portfolio_correlation_matrix to ensure low pairwise correlations
Call calculate_group_performances (industry, sub_industry) and portfolio_industry_concentration to assess diversification
Call calculate_portfolio_factor_tilts (factors='all') to evaluate style balance
Call portfolio_VaR_calculator (level='portfolio' and 'industry') to assess tail risk
Call episodic_remember to store portfolio_v1 snapshot (title='portfolio_v1')

tasks.description: Improve to Portfolio v2 via analytics; log and recall

subtasks.description: Adjust holdings/weights to improve Sharpe/Alpha, reduce corr/VaR, and hit beta/exposure constraints
Re-run diagnostics: exposures, beta, returns, correlations, factor tilts, concentration, VaR using same tools
Verify hard constraints: beta 0.175–0.6, net ~30% (±5%), gross 150–250%, performance thresholds met
Call episodic_remember to store portfolio_v2 (title='portfolio_v2')
Call episodic_recall to retrieve 'portfolio_v2' and confirm persistence

tasks.description: Improve to Portfolio v3 via further optimization; log and recall

subtasks.description: Optimize for lower pairwise corr and balanced factor tilts; refine shorts within size limits
Re-run full diagnostics suite as in 4b to confirm improvements
Confirm all hard constraints and performance thresholds attained
Call episodic_remember to store portfolio_v3 (title='portfolio_v3')
Call episodic_recall to retrieve 'portfolio_v3' for verification

tasks.description: Iterate beyond v3 if needed; confirm readiness

subtasks.description: If any constraint unmet (Ann. Return >10%, Sharpe >1.0, Alpha >1.0%, beta/net/gross), iterate allocations and re-run tools
Call get_completion_analysis to assess objective attainment and confidence
Call check_plan_completion_status to confirm plan readiness for final answer
If blocked, Call handle_task_failure with error_message and recover plan
Run final metrics: exposures, beta, returns, correlations, factor tilts, concentration, VaR to evidence compliance
Manually verify short sizing vs liquidity policy (4–5% liquid; 2–3% illiquid)
Call add_task_evidence to attach key outputs (beta, net/gross, Sharpe, Alpha, VaR, corr)
Optionally Call mark_task_complete for validation task

tasks.description: Formatting and final output (must be last)

subtasks.description: Assemble final positions JSON per schema: ticker, position, detailed thesis, detailed key_drivers, allocation (floats)
Ensure tone is professional, direct; avoid fabrication; cite tool-based metrics where relevant
Cross-check allocations against portfolio_dict; ensure net/gross/beta adherence reflected in final weights
Deliver the JSON array as the final answer
